heroSection.title: Invest in Saudi Real Estate
heroSection.subtitle: from 100 SAR Only
heroSection.description: Start your investment journey in Saudi real estate easily and safely. Invest in real properties through CapNest platform regulated by the Capital Market Authority (REGA). From owning zero assets to owning assets in under 3 minutes (120 seconds).

howItWorksSection.title: How Investing Works
howItWorksSection.subtitle: Start building your real estate portfolio in three simple steps. No complexity, no hassle.
howItWorksSection.step1Description: Create your free account and fill in your basic details to join the waiting list.
howItWorksSection.step2Description: Browse the first available property through Digishares and choose your investment share.
howItWorksSection.step3Description: Invest and start earning monthly returns from your real estate investments.

testimonialsSection.title: What Our Investors Say
testimonialsSection.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied investors building wealth through fractional real estate.

testimonial1.quote: I was looking for a safe way to invest in Saudi real estate. CapNest made it so easy. I invested 500 SAR in a property in Riyadh and receive a steady monthly return. I recommend it to anyone wanting to start real estate investing.
testimonial1.name: Fatima Al-Al

testimonial2.quote: As a young professional starting my career, I didn't think I could invest in real estate. CapNest changed that. Now I have a diversified portfolio of 3 properties in different cities. The returns are much better than a savings account.
testimonial2.name: Khalid Al-Ahmad

testimonial3.quote: I wanted to build an additional income source for the future. CapNest is a trusted platform regulated by REGA, which is very important to me. I invested 1000 SAR and receive monthly income that helps me with better financial planning. Thank you CapNest!
testimonial3.name: Noura Al-Salem

footer.description: Making real estate investment accessible to everyone through fractional ownership.
footer.warning: Investments involve risk. The value of investments can go down as well as up. Past performance is not a guarantee of future results.
